<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Email Signature</title>
</head>
<body style="margin:0;padding:0;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;text-align:left;">
  
  <!-- MAIN CONTAINER -->
  <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:600px;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;background:#ffffff;border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dde8ec;">

  <!-- TOP TEAL BAR -->
  <tr>
    <td height="5" style="font-size:0;line-height:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1ac2c1 0%,#0de0df 55%,rgba(26,194,193,0.28) 100%);">&nbsp;</td>
  </tr>

  <!-- MAIN BODY -->
  <tr>
    <td>
      <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
        <tr>

          <!-- LEFT: Photo + QR Code (Stacked) -->
          <td width="200" valign="top" style="padding:24px 10px;text-align:center;vertical-align:top;">

            <!-- PROFILE PHOTO -->
            <div style="width:120px;height:120px;margin:0 auto 12px auto;overflow:hidden;border-radius:50%;background:#f0f0f0;">
              
              <img src="data:image/png;base64,
"
 alt="Profile Photo" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">
            </div>
            <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:5px;font-size:16px;color:#1ac2c1;font-weight:600;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">VT - ID: 8842</div>

            <!-- QR CODE (Below Photo) -->
            <div style="width:100px;height:100px;margin:0 auto;overflow:hidden;">
                <img src="https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=100x100&data=https://verifitech.com&color=" width="100" height="100" style="width:100px;height:100px;background:#f0f0f0;display:block;margin:0 auto;">
            </div>
            
    <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:5px;font-size:16px;color:#1ac2c1;font-weight:600;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Trust Tag</div>
          </td>

         
          <!-- RIGHT: All Info + Logo -->
          <td valign="middle" style="padding:24px 22px 24px 15px;">

            <!-- Header Row: Name + Logo -->
            <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%" style="margin-bottom:4px;">
              <tr valign="middle">
                <!-- Name Column -->
                <td align="left">
                  <div style="font-family:Georgia,'Times New Roman',serif;font-size:21px;font-weight:700;color:#0b1e2d;line-height:1;">Simon Smith</div>
                </td>
                <!-- Logo Column -->
                <td align="right" style="padding-left:10px;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Company Logo" style="width:20px;height:auto;">
                </td>
              </tr>
            </table>

         
            <!-- Job Title -->
            <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#1ac2c1;margin-bottom:2px;">Head of Marketing</div>
            
            <!-- Company Name -->
            <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#4a6a7a;margin-bottom:13px;">Verifitech</div>
            
            <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#e0ecf0,transparent);margin-bottom:12px;"></div>

            <!-- CONTACTS with Base64 IMG Icons -->
            <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-bottom:13px;">
              
              <!-- Numbers Block -->
              <tr>
                <td style="padding-bottom:7px;">
                  <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
                    <tr valign="top">
                      <!-- Icon -->
                      <td style="padding-right:7px;">
                        <div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;background:#f0fdfb;border:1px solid rgba(26,194,193,0.2);text-align:center;line-height:22px;">
                          <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="12" height="12" style="vertical-align:middle;" alt="Phone">
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <!-- Numbers -->
                      <td style="font-size:12px;color:#3a5a6a; line-height:1.5;">
                        <a href="tel:+919240262318" style="color:#3a5a6a;text-decoration:none;">+91 924 026 2318</a><br>
                        <a href="tel:+19292141144" style="color:#3a5a6a;text-decoration:none;">+1 929 214 1144</a>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </table>
                </td>
              </tr>

              <!-- Email -->
              <tr>
                <td style="padding-bottom:7px;">
                  <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
                    <tr valign="middle">
                      <td style="padding-right:7px;">
                        <div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;background:#f0fdfb;border:1px solid rgba(26,194,193,0.2);text-align:center;line-height:22px;">
                          <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="12" height="12" style="vertical-align:middle;" alt="Email">
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td style="font-size:12px;color:#3a5a6a;">
                        <a href="mailto:simon@verifitech.com" style="color:#3a5a6a;text-decoration:none;">simon@verifitech.com</a>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </table>
                </td>
              </tr>

              <!-- Website -->
              <tr>
                <td>
                  <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
                    <tr valign="middle">
                      <td style="padding-right:7px;">
                        <div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:6px;background:#f0fdfb;border:1px solid rgba(26,194,193,0.2);text-align:center;line-height:22px;">
                          <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="12" height="12" style="vertical-align:middle;" alt="Website">
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td style="font-size:12px;color:#3a5a6a;">
                        <a href="https://verifitech.com" style="color:#3a5a6a;text-decoration:none;">verifitech.com</a>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  </table>
                </td>
              </tr>
            </table>

            <!-- SOCIAL MEDIA ICONS -->
            <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="margin-bottom:13px;">
              <tr>
                <td style="padding-right:7px;"><a href="https://linkedin.com/company/verifitech" title="LinkedIn" style="display:block;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:#1ac2c1;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(26,194,193,0.28);"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="16" height="16" style="margin-top:8px;vertical-align:top;" alt="LinkedIn"></a></td>

                <td style="padding-right:7px;"><a href="https://facebook.com/verifitech" title="Facebook" style="display:block;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:#1ac2c1;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(26,194,193,0.28);"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxNiIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxNiIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDI0IDI0IiBmaWxsPSJ3aGl0ZSI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTE4IDJoLTNhNSA1IDAgMCAwLTUgNXYzSDd2NGgzdjhoNHYtOGgzbDEtNGgtNHYtMmExIDEgMCAwIDEgMS0xaDN6Ii8+PC9zdmc+" width="16" height="16" style="margin-top:8px;vertical-align:top;" alt="Facebook"></a></td>

                <td style="padding-right:7px;"><a href="https://instagram.com/verifitech" title="Instagram" style="display:block;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;background:#1ac2c1;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(26,194,193,0.28);"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="16" height="16" style="margin-top:8px;vertical-align:top;" alt="Instagram"></a></td>
              </tr>
            </table>
            
          </td>

        </tr>
      </table>
    </td>
  </tr>

  <!-- FOOTER: 6 CERTIFICATION BADGES ALIGNED -->
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:20px 24px;background:#ffffff;border-top:1px solid #e0e0e0;">
      <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
        <tr>
          <td align="center">
            <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0">
              <tr>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 1" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 2" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 3" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 4" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 5" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
                <td width="60" style="text-align:center;">
                  <img src="data:image/png;base64,
" alt="Cert 6" style="width:36px;height:36px;background:#e8e8e8;display:block;margin:0 auto;border-radius:4px;">
                </td>
              </tr>
            </table>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </td>
  </tr>


  <!-- FOOTER WITH DISCLAIMER & PRIVACY -->
  <tr>
    <td style="padding:20px 24px;background:#ffffff;border-top:1px solid #e0e0e0;">
      <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
        <tr>
          <td style="font-size:10px;color:#888888;line-height:1.5;text-align:center;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">
            <!-- PRIVACY & UNSUBSCRIBE LINKS -->
            <p style="margin:0;">
              <a href="#" style="color:#1ac2c1;text-decoration:none;">Email Privacy Policy</a> 
              <span style="color:#cccccc;">|</span> 
              <a href="#" style="color:#1ac2c1;text-decoration:none;">Unsubscribe</a>
            </p>
          </td>
        </tr>
      </table>
    </td>
  </tr>

  </table>
</body>
</html>
